title: Product Marketing Manager (m/w/d) für die Tiergruppen Katze und Hund
required_skills: 2-5 years experience in product management / marketing
Multi-channel and integrated marketing incl. online marketing and social media
matched_skills: 4+ years product marketing experience (B2B, GTM strategy, product launches)
Portfolio gap analysis and product lifecycle management
Cross-functional collaboration with sales, supply chain and external partners
missing_skills: POS material and display development experience
Trade marketing strategy (B2C / retail channel focus)
Brand awareness and consumer promotion campaigns
Pet / FMCG / consumer goods industry background
core_responsibilities: Manage product marketing for cat and dog product lines in EMEA
Steer new product introduction process with global brand management, supply chain and sales
Develop trade marketing strategies and POS materials
Conduct market, competitive and trend analyses for product development and pricing
recommended_emphasis: Highlight EMEA multi-market promotion experience and cross-regional campaign management
Emphasize product launch execution track record (4 launches, measurable contract value)
Showcase competitive analysis and portfolio gap analysis as direct match to market and competitive analysis requirement
Lead with sales collateral and presentation development to address Verkaufsunterlagen/Produktpräsentationen duties
Mention German language actively used in professional settings (studies at Leuphana, Hamburg-area location) to mitigate fluency gap
risk_flags: German proficiency (B1+) below 'fließend' requirement — likely a hard filter for this German-speaking role
No consumer goods / pet industry background; role is B2C-oriented whereas CV is predominantly B2B
POS and retail trade marketing experience absent from CV
